title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Maersk India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Maersk India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Logistics Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!
